description_long: This object is a vertical metal structure with a robust base, supporting a series of electrical enclosures and control boxes mounted at varying heights. The central section features a prominent control panel with visible switches, dials, and a red emergency lever, protected by a slanted metal cover. Above the control panel, two large electrical boxes are mounted side by side, each with conduit connections and cable entries. The structure is reinforced with bolts and brackets, and several cables and wires are routed along the frame, some secured with cable ties. The base is wide and heavy, likely anchored to the ground for stability, and the overall construction is industrial, with a utilitarian finish. The object is primarily metallic gray, with some red and black accents on the control elements.
description: A tall, metallic utility structure with electrical boxes, a control panel, and visible wiring, featuring a red emergency lever and robust industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the control panel with switches, dials, and a red lever, as well as the main electrical boxes and wiring.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the control panel cover and the arrangement of electrical boxes and conduits along the vertical frame.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the structural frame, mounting brackets, and cable routing, with less visibility of the control elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the profile of the control panel and the cable management, with the red lever partially visible.
attribute_arrangement_of_crossarms: No crossarms are present; the structure consists of a single vertical support with attached electrical enclosures and control elements.
attribute_configuration_of_attached_powe: No external power lines are visibly attached; all wiring appears to be internal or routed through conduits within the structure.
